calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Off Calendar

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Off Calendar

Petititon To Approve Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Gerard Lam, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Wen F. Hui, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Victor Ye present in court.
Liza C. Milanes, Esq., appearing for Defendant Richmond District Neighborhood.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $15,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $3,160.00 payable to Gerard Lam.
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to third parties in the total amount of $2,356.90 for court costs and litigation expenses advanced by Gerard Lam, attorney for minor in this action.

A net balance of $9,483.90 to be deposited into a blocked account at Bank of America San Francisco, CA until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 6, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-04-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Off Calendar
